title: doc_index_poller crashes with DetachedInstanceError on every poll cycle

steps.description: Fix DocIndexPoller.poll() session boundary: extract project_id strings inside the with-block (Form A: db.query(Project.id) column-only); audit doc_job_poller.py for the same pattern and either fix or document already-correct in S01 report
Review S01: fix correctness (no detached attribute access); doc_job_poller audit verdict accuracy; scope discipline (only the two poller files modified)

Write tests/unit/daemon/test_doc_index_poller_session_boundary.py: real testcontainer-backed session, two enabled + one disabled Project rows, assert _process_project called for the two specific enabled IDs only, no DetachedInstanceError
Review S03: real session not mocked (CRITICAL); semantic value assertions not shape (CRITICAL); falsifiability against pre-fix code; enabled-filter coverage
Global review across S01 + S03 — verify fix and test compose into a complete fix; AC3 adjacent-poller audit verdict is sound; integration tests pass end-to-end
